name: Remote Global HR & Employer of Record API
what_it_does: Remote REST API for global employer of record (EOR) and international payroll platform. Enables AI agents to manage international employee and contractor onboarding for 170+ countries, handle employment contract and offer letter generation for global hiring, access payroll submission and compensation management for international employees, retrieve expense report and reimbursement data for financial reconciliation, manage contractor invoice and payment processing for global contractor programs, handle equity and stock option administration for international employees, access benefits and local statutory compliance data by country, retrieve time and leave management data for workforce planning, manage offboarding and final settlement processing for global employees, and integrate international employment data with HRIS, accounting, and talent management platforms.
use_cases: Onboarding international employees from global talent acquisition agents
Processing contractor payments from global vendor management agents
Retrieving payroll data from financial consolidation agents
Managing leave and time data from workforce planning agents
not_for: US-only domestic payroll without international employment requirements
Single country HR without multi-country employer of record model
Consumer employment without enterprise global workforce management
best_when: A distributed company using Remote wants AI agents to automate international employee onboarding, contractor management, global payroll data retrieval, compliance management, and HRIS integration.
avoid_when: LEGAL RISK: International employment law varies significantly by country — automated contract generation and employment terms must be reviewed by local employment counsel. Payroll submissions in international jurisdictions have statutory deadlines; missed submissions incur penalties. Contractor misclassification risk varies by country; automated contractor onboarding should include classification review.

auth.notes: Remote uses OAuth 2.0 with access and refresh tokens. Developer portal at developer.remote.com. OpenAPI specification published. Open-source JSON schema on GitHub (remoteoss). Webhooks for employment lifecycle events. REST API with JSON responses. Sandbox environment for development and testing. 170+ countries supported for EOR.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free sandbox for development; production requires Remote subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: EOR ($599/employee/month), Contractor ($29/contractor/month), HRIS ($10/employee/month); API access included
pricing.notes: San Francisco, California. Founded 2019. Private ($496M funding, $3B valuation). Global EOR and HR platform market. 10,000+ customers. 170+ countries. Founded by GitLab-connected team (remote-first expertise). Known for transparent pricing vs. Deel. Open-source JSON schema for employment data. Competes with Deel and Rippling for global employment platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL RISK: International employment contracts have country-specific requirements; automated contract generation must use Remote's country-validated templates — do not customize without legal review
Country-specific payroll deadlines — each country has statutory payroll cutoff dates; missed submissions have penalties; automate with country-specific deadline awareness
EOR vs. contractor — employment model selection has legal and tax implications; automated onboarding must route through appropriate model with human classification review
Sandbox environment — Remote provides full sandbox for testing; use sandbox before production; some sandbox behaviors may differ from production for sensitive operations
Webhook reliability — implement idempotent webhook handlers; employment lifecycle events may be retried; track event IDs to prevent duplicate processing
Open-source schema — Remote publishes JSON schema for employment data on GitHub (remoteoss); leverage schema for validation before API submission
agent_readiness.security_notes: Global EOR and payroll. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US. International employee and contractor data across 170+ countries.

security_score_components.security_notes: Global HR and EOR. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US. International employee and payroll data.
